intro.text: The Hart County Tax Assessor’s Office is responsible for identifying, listing, and appraising taxable property within the county in accordance with Georgia law.

chiefAppraiser.subtitle: Office leadership and contact information.
chiefAppraiser.name: Jane Doe
text: The Chief Appraiser oversees appraisal operations, property records, and assessment processes for the Hart County Tax Assessor’s Office.
Please contact the office for assistance with property records, assessment notices, exemptions, and general questions related to the appraisal process.

officeLinks.subtitle: Common forms, resources, and related office links.
officeLinks.footerText: * QPublic is a third party website and is not to be used for legal purposes.

miscCards.title: Services
miscCards.subtitle: Common services provided by the office.

miscCards.title: Important Information
miscCards.subtitle: Helpful information for property owners.
text: The Tax Assessor’s Office does not set tax rates and does not collect property taxes.
Questions about tax bills or payments should be directed to the appropriate billing or tax collection office.
